name: The Great Gluten Turkey, Part Two
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the "turkey" in a preheated 350 degree Fahrenheit (°F) oven and bake for 1 ¼ to 1 ½ hours, basting every 15 minutes with the wine-margarine mixture and juices in the pan. If it browns too much, loosely cover with aluminum foil.
2. Carve as you would with a regular roast and accompany with stuffing.
Note: The Great Gluten Turkey recipe uses 10 pounds of flour. For more flavor, an additional tablespoon of light yeast flavoring may be added to the gravet for mock turkey.
